'''chabunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dragback|dragback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dragback|dragback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chabunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæbinith|chæbinith]] || [[word:chæbinij|chæbinij]] || [[word:chæbinish|chæbinish]] || [[word:chæbini|chæbini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chabubunuth|chabubunuth]] || [[word:chabubunuj|chabubunuj]] || [[word:chabubunush|chabubunush]] || [[word:chabubunu|chabubunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chabunuth|chabunuth]] || [[word:chabunuj|chabunuj]] || [[word:chabunush|chabunush]] || [[word:chabunu|chabunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chabufnuth|chabufnuth]] || [[word:chabufnuj|chabufnuj]] || [[word:chabufnush|chabufnush]] || [[word:chabufnuf|chabufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chabunuthu|chabunuthu]] || [[word:chabunuju|chabunuju]] || [[word:chabunushu|chabunushu]] || [[word:chabunuku|chabunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chabunuth|chabunuth]] || [[word:chabunuj|chabunuj]] || [[word:chabunush|chabunush]] || [[word:chabunu|chabunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chabunuthul|chabunuthul]] || [[word:chabunujul|chabunujul]] || [[word:chabunushul|chabunushul]] || [[word:chabunukul|chabunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chabunuthuthu|chabunuthuthu]] || [[word:chabunujuju|chabunujuju]] || [[word:chabunushushu|chabunushushu]] || [[word:chabunuku|chabunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chabunuthun|chabunuthun]] || [[word:chabunujun|chabunujun]] || [[word:chabunushun|chabunushun]] || [[word:chabunukun|chabunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chabunuthuoro|chabunuthuoro]] || [[word:chabunujuoro|chabunujuoro]] || [[word:chabunushuoro|chabunushuoro]] || [[word:chabunukuoro|chabunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
